salmanshh_platformer_physics.name: Physics Platformer
salmanshh_platformer_physics.description: Physics-based platformer movement — run, jump, wall-slide, and interact using the built-in Physics behavior.

maxSpeed.name: Max Speed
maxSpeed.desc: Maximum horizontal movement speed in px/s.

acceleration.name: Acceleration
acceleration.desc: Rate at which horizontal velocity increases toward Max Speed (px/s²).

deceleration.name: Deceleration
deceleration.desc: Rate at which horizontal velocity decreases to zero when no input is given (px/s²).

jumpStrength.name: Jump Strength
jumpStrength.desc: Upward impulse magnitude applied when a jump executes (px/s).

gravity.name: Gravity
gravity.desc: Additional downward acceleration (px/s²) applied per tick on top of Physics world gravity.

slopeTolerance.name: Slope Tolerance
slopeTolerance.desc: Contact classification threshold as a fraction of half-height below center to count as floor.

coyoteTime.name: Coyote Time
coyoteTime.desc: Seconds after leaving a floor edge during which a jump is still allowed.

wallCoyoteTime.name: Wall Coyote Time
wallCoyoteTime.desc: Seconds after leaving a wall during which a wall jump is still allowed. Mirrors floor coyote time for walls. Set to 0 to disable.

jumpBuffer.name: Jump Buffer
jumpBuffer.desc: Seconds a jump input is remembered before landing.

maxJumps.name: Max Jumps
maxJumps.desc: Total jumps allowed per airborne period. 1 = single jump, 2 = double jump.

wallSlide.name: Wall Slide
wallSlide.desc: Clamp fall speed to Wall Slide Speed when pressing into a wall while airborne.

wallSlideSpeed.name: Wall Slide Speed
wallSlideSpeed.desc: Maximum downward speed (px/s) while wall sliding.

wallJumpStrength.name: Wall Jump Strength
wallJumpStrength.desc: Horizontal impulse component of a wall jump.

variableJumpHeight.name: Variable Jump Height
variableJumpHeight.desc: Hold the jump button for a higher jump, release it early for a shorter one.

jumpReleaseDamping.name: Jump Release Damping
jumpReleaseDamping.desc: Percentage (0–100) of upward velocity retained when the jump button is released early. 50 = keep half speed; 0 = instant cut; 100 = no variable height effect.

debugMode.name: Debug Mode
debugMode.desc: Print contact classification and velocity state to the browser console each tick.

SetAcceleration.description: Change how quickly the character speeds up.

SetCoyoteTime.description: How long after walking off a ledge the player can still jump. Makes platforming more forgiving. Set to 0 to disable.

SetDebugMode.description: Turn debug console output on or off. Prints movement state to the browser console (F12) — handy when tuning values.

SetDeceleration.description: How quickly the character stops when releasing input. Low = icy sliding, high = instant stop.

SetGravity.description: Override the additional downward gravity (px/s²) at runtime.

gravity.name: Gravity
gravity.desc: Extra downward pull acceleration in px/s². (0 = use Physics gravity only).

SetJumpBuffer.description: How early before landing a jump press is accepted. Prevents missed jumps when the button is pressed slightly too soon. Set to 0 to disable.

SetJumpStrength.description: Change how high the character jumps.

SetMaxFallSpeed.description: Change the maximum fall speed the character can reach.

speed.name: Speed
speed.desc: New top speed in pixels per second.

ResetJumps.description: Give all jumps back, as if the character just landed.

SetJumpReleaseDamping.description: Set the percentage of upward velocity retained when the jump button is released early. Lower values give more control over jump height.

percent.name: Damping %
percent.desc: Percentage of upward velocity to keep on jump release (0-100). Default is 50.

SetMaxJumps.description: How many times the character can jump before touching the ground. Set to 2 to unlock double jump.

SetVariableJumpHeight.description: Tap for a short hop, hold for a full jump. Disable for a fixed jump height every time.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: Whether variable jump height is active.

SetWallCoyoteTime.description: How long after leaving a wall the player can still wall jump. Forgives slightly late button presses. Set to 0 to disable.

time.name: Time
time.desc: Wall coyote time duration in seconds.

SetWallJump.description: Toggle the ability to jump off walls.

SetWallJumpStrength.description: How far the character pushes away from the wall on a wall jump. Higher = wider arc — use to tune the feel of vertical shaft climbing.

strength.name: Strength
strength.desc: Horizontal wall jump impulse in px/s.

SetWallSlide.description: Toggle the ability to slide down walls.

SetWallSlideSpeed.description: How fast the character slides down a wall. Lower = slower, more controlled. e.g. set very low for a sticky-wall ability.

speed.name: Speed
speed.desc: Maximum fall speed (px/s) while wall sliding.

ApplyImpulse.description: Add a push to the character's current velocity, they keep control and deceleration tapers it off.

vx.name: Vector X
vx.desc: Horizontal impulse in px/s (positive = right, negative = left).

vy.name: Vector Y
vy.desc: Vertical impulse in px/s (positive = down, negative = up).

DrivenMove.description: Temporarily drives the character at the given velocity, suppressing movement input for the duration. Use for dashes, knockback, launch pads, or any externally driven movement. Gravity, wall slide, and max fall speed still apply.

vx.name: Vector X
vx.desc: Horizontal driven velocity in px/s (positive = right, negative = left). Use for dashes or sideways knockback.

vy.name: Vector Y
vy.desc: Vertical driven velocity in px/s (positive = down, negative = up). Use for launches or upward knockback.

duration.name: Duration
duration.desc: How long in seconds to suppress movement input.

SetEnabled.description: Turn the whole behavior on or off.

SetFreezeAxis.description: Lock movement on one or both axes.

axis.name: Axis
axis.desc: Which axis to freeze or unfreeze.

freeze.name: Freeze
freeze.desc: Check to freeze, uncheck to unfreeze.

SetIgnoreInput.description: Block all character input without stopping physics.

SetOnCeiling.description: Force the character to be treated as touching a ceiling this tick. Use with moving platforms or ceiling colliders where Physics contact alone is unreliable.

onCeiling.name: On ceiling
onCeiling.desc: True to force the character to be considered touching a ceiling.

SetOnFloor.description: Force the character to be treated as grounded this tick. Use with moving platforms where Physics contact alone is unreliable.

onFloor.name: On floor
onFloor.desc: True to force the character to be considered on the floor.

SetVector.description: Set horizontal and vertical speed in px/s.

vectorY.name: Vector Y
vectorY.desc: New vertical velocity in px/s. Use negative values to move upward.

SetVectorX.description: Directly set the horizontal Physics velocity (px/s).

SetVectorY.description: Directly set the vertical Physics velocity (px/s).

vectorY.name: Vector Y
vectorY.desc: New vertical velocity in px/s. Use negative values to move upward.

SimulateControl.description: Simulate one of the movement controls being held down.

control.name: Control
control.desc: Which control to simulate. Left/Right: hold every tick while moving. Jump: press on the frame the jump button is pressed. (if 'Variable Jumping) Jump release: press on the frame the jump button is released. Stop: instantly zero velocity.

CanJump.description: True when a jump is possible right now (on ground, in coyote window, or has jumps left).

CompareSpeed.description: Compare the character's current speed to a value.

value.name: Speed
value.desc: Speed to compare against in px/s.

CompareVectorX.description: Compare the current X velocity component against a value.

CompareVectorY.description: Compare the current Y velocity component against a value. Positive = downward.

IsAbilityEnabled.description: True if the chosen ability is currently on. Use to show unlock icons in an ability upgrade UI.

IsAnimMode.description: True when the animation state matches the selected option. Use to drive sprite animation switching without tracking state manually.

mode.name: Mode
mode.desc: The animation mode to compare against.

IsAxisFrozen.description: True if the chosen axis is currently locked. Use to check whether a stasis or freeze effect is still active.

IsDrivenMoving.description: True while a driven move (e.g. dash or knockback) is in progress. Use to lock out other actions until it finishes.

IsEnabled.description: Check if the behavior is currently active.

IsFacingRight.description: Check if the character is facing right. Invert for facing left.

IsFalling.description: True while the character is moving downward in the air.

IsIgnoringInput.description: Check if input is currently being ignored.

IsJumping.description: True while the character is moving upward after a jump.

IsMoving.description: True whenever the character has any movement.

IsOnCeiling.description: True when touching a ceiling. Use to cut upward velocity when the character bumps their head.

IsOnWall.description: True when touching the chosen wall side. Use to play a wall-grab or push animation.

IsWallSliding.description: True while sliding down a wall.

OnDoubleJumped.description: Triggered when the character uses an extra mid-air jump.

OnFacingChanged.description: Triggered when the character turns around.

OnFallenOff.description: Triggered when the character walks off a ledge.

OnHitCeiling.description: Triggered when the character first makes contact with a ceiling.

OnJumped.description: Triggered every time the character jumps.

OnLanded.description: Triggered when the character touches the ground after being in the air.

OnLeftWallContact.description: Fires when the character leaves a wall without landing. The wall coyote window opens here — use to start a wall-coyote timer indicator.

OnWallJumped.description: Triggered when the character jumps off a wall.

AirTime.description: Seconds the character has been in the air. 0 on the ground.

AnimMode.description: Current animation mode string: "Idle", "Moving", "Jumping", "Falling", "Wall sliding", or "Disabled".

FacingDirection.description: Current facing as a signed number: -1 = left, 1 = right.

JumpsRemaining.description: How many jumps the character has left before landing.

MovingAngle.description: The angle the character is moving in degrees.

Speed.description: Current movement speed in px/s (magnitude of velocity vector).

VectorX.description: Current horizontal Physics velocity (px/s). Positive = right.

VectorY.description: Current vertical Physics velocity (px/s). Positive = down.

WallContactSide.description: Side of the most recent wall contact: -1 = left wall, 1 = right wall, 0 = no wall.

WallCoyoteTimer.description: Seconds left in the wall coyote window. Use to show a brief visual cue that a wall jump is still possible.
